entry.title: Facebook faces unprecedented advertisement boycott

link.title: Facebook faces unprecedented advertisement boycott

entry.content: Campaign aims to force the world’s largest social media platform to crack down on hate speech and racist content on its pages.
entry.summary: Campaign aims to force the world’s largest social media platform to crack down on hate speech and racist content on its pages.

entry.title: Fire crews and ambulance service vehicles on the scene of house fire in Sheriff Street

link.title: Fire crews and ambulance service vehicles on the scene of house fire in Sheriff Street

entry.content:
The teams were called to the Hartlepool street just after 9pm on Wednesday, July 8.
Fire crews and ambulance service vehicles on the scene of house fire in Sheriff Street
Fire crews and ambulance service vehicles on the scene of house fire in Sheriff Street
Fire crews and ambulance service vehicles on the scene of house fire in Sheriff Street
entry.summary: The teams were called to the Hartlepool street just after 9pm on Wednesday, July 8.Fire crews and ambulance service vehicles on the scene of house fire in Sheriff Street Fire crews and ambulance service vehicles on the scene of house fire in Sheriff Street Fire crews and ambulance service vehicles on the scene of house fire in Sheriff Street

entry.title: The Government Is Looking to Give Freelancers and Independent Contractors $1,000 With No Strings Attached

link.title: The Government Is Looking to Give Freelancers and Independent Contractors $1,000 With No Strings Attached

entry.content: Freelancers and Independent contractors have been hit hard during the coronavirus pandemic. Traditionally, unemployment insurance usually goes to companies’ full time employees. However, MoneyTalksNews is reporting that during the pandemic, freelancers can apply for the same unemployment benefits while at the same time getting $1,000 from the government.
entry.summary: Freelancers and Independent contractors have been hit hard during the coronavirus pandemic. Traditionally, unemployment insurance usually goes to companies’ full time employees. However, MoneyTalksNews is reporting that during the pandemic, freelancers can apply for the same unemployment benefits while at the same time getting $1,000 from the government.

entry.title: Quiz - Connaissez-vous bien Amélie Mauresmo ?

link.title: Quiz - Connaissez-vous bien Amélie Mauresmo ?

entry.content: Alors qu’Amélie Mauresmo fête ce dimanche ses 41 ans, testez vos connaissances sur la carrière de l’ancienne numéro un mondiale.
entry.summary: Alors qu’Amélie Mauresmo fête ce dimanche ses 41 ans, testez vos connaissances sur la carrière de l’ancienne numéro un mondiale.

entry.title: Selon des médias britanniques, Johnny Depp aurait quitté Amber Heard car elle aurait «déféqué dans son lit»

link.title: Selon des médias britanniques, Johnny Depp aurait quitté Amber Heard car elle aurait «déféqué dans son lit»

entry.content: Trois ans après leur divorce, Johnny Depp et Amber Heard se sont retrouvés au tribunal à l’occasion du procès intenté par l’acteur contre le tabloïd britannique The Sun qui avait décrit Johnny Depp en mari violent dans un article de 2018. Les anecdotes et autres révélations scabreuses de la vie du couple fusent lors du procès.
entry.summary: Trois ans après leur divorce, Johnny Depp et Amber Heard se sont retrouvés au tribunal à l’occasion du procès intenté par l’acteur contre le tabloïd britannique The Sun qui avait décrit Johnny Depp en mari violent dans un article de 2018. Les anecdotes et autres révélations scabreuses de la vie du couple fusent lors du procès.

entry.title: Where My Eyes Linger Episode 7

link.title: Where My Eyes Linger Episode 7

entry.content:
Full Episodes:
Korean BL
Synopsis: This series tells the story about Tae Joo, the 18-year-old only successor to the TB Group. He’s blessed with a wealthy family, good looks, and no troubles to worry for often described as a handsome guy in the spotlight. His 18-year-old bodyguard, Goo Koo, has been trained in all different types of martial arts and is physically trained to have a strong body. He’s also very thoughtful, and Tae Joo is his only friend, while Goo Koo is the only person Tae Joo feels as though he can trust, and feels relieved around him.
entry.summary: Full Episodes: Korean BL Synopsis: This series tells the story about Tae Joo, the 18-year-old only successor to the TB Group. He’s blessed with a wealthy family, good looks, and no troubles to worry for often described as a handsome guy in the spotlight. His 18-year-old bodyguard, Goo Koo, has been trained in all different types of martial arts and is physically trained to have a strong body. He’s also very thoughtful, and Tae Joo is his only friend, while Goo Koo is the only person Tae Joo feels as though he can trust, and feels relieved around him.

entry.title: 15 (super) idées pour aménager une petite cuisine

link.title: 15 (super) idées pour aménager une petite cuisine

entry.content: Rangements en hauteur, électroménager encastré, crédence aimantée… Voici 15 idées ingénieuses pour aménager une petite cuisine et gagner de la place !
entry.summary: Rangements en hauteur, électroménager encastré, crédence aimantée… Voici 15 idées ingénieuses pour aménager une petite cuisine et gagner de la place !

entry.title: India China Face Off LAC: America के इस बयान से चीन को लग जाएगी मिर्ची ! वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: India China Face Off LAC: America के इस बयान से चीन को लग जाएगी मिर्ची ! वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
White House Press Secretary Kayleigh McEnany said that according to President Donald Trump the aggressive stance of Beijing against India and other countries in the region confirms the "true nature" of the Chinese Communist Party.Watch video,
अमेरिका ने एक बार फिर चीन को खरी-खोटी सुनाई है. अमेरिका ने कहा है कि चीन भारत के खिलाफ लगातार आक्रामक है. व्हाइट हाउस की प्रेस सचिव केली मैक्नेनी ने अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति डोनाल्ड ट्रंप के हवाले से कहा कि ‘इलाके में भारत सहित दूसरे देशों के प्रति चीन का आक्रामक रवैया उसकी कम्युनिस्ट पार्टी वाली सत्ता का असली चेहरा है.देखें वीडियो
#IndiaChinaFaceOff #America #LAC
entry.summary: White House Press Secretary Kayleigh McEnany said that according to President Donald Trump the aggressive stance of Beijing against India and other countries in the region confirms the "true nature" of the Chinese Communist Party.Watch video, अमेरिका ने एक बार फिर चीन को खरी-खोटी सुनाई है. अमेरिका ने कहा है कि चीन भारत के खिलाफ लगातार आक्रामक है. व्हाइट हाउस की प्रेस सचिव केली मैक्नेनी ने अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति डोनाल्ड ट्रंप के हवाले से कहा कि ‘इलाके में भारत सहित दूसरे देशों के प्रति चीन का आक्रामक रवैया उसकी कम्युनिस्ट पार्टी वाली सत्ता का असली चेहरा है.देखें वीडियो #IndiaChinaFaceOff #America #LAC

entry.content: The eNASCAR Heat Pro League traveled (virtually) to Southern California for a date with Auto Club Speedway.
entry.summary: The eNASCAR Heat Pro League traveled (virtually) to Southern California for a date with Auto Club Speedway.

entry.title: Une commission d’enquête alerte sur la progression de l’islam politique en France

link.title: Une commission d’enquête alerte sur la progression de l’islam politique en France

entry.content: La commission d’enquête sénatoriale sur la radicalisation islamiste et les moyens de la combattre tire la sonnette d’alarme. Dans un rapport présenté jeudi 9 juillet, que nos confrères du « Figaro » ont pu consulter, cette commission, créée en novembre 2019 sous l’impulsion du groupe Les Républicains au Sénat, met en avant « la réalité de la radicalisation islamiste » en France pointant un « islamisme radical polymorphe, s’insinuant dans tous les aspects de la vie sociale et qui tend à imposer une nouvelle norme sociale en se prévalant de la liberté individuelle ».
entry.summary: La commission d’enquête sénatoriale sur la radicalisation islamiste et les moyens de la combattre tire la sonnette d’alarme. Dans un rapport présenté jeudi 9 juillet, que nos confrères du « Figaro » ont pu consulter, cette commission, créée en novembre 2019 sous l’impulsion du groupe Les Républicains au Sénat, met en avant « la réalité de la radicalisation islamiste » en France pointant un « islamisme radical polymorphe, s’insinuant dans tous les aspects de la vie sociale et qui tend à imposer une nouvelle norme sociale en se prévalant de la liberté individuelle ».

entry.title: Belajar Kasus Via Vallen, Peran Idola, Fans, dan Social Media

link.title: Belajar Kasus Via Vallen, Peran Idola, Fans, dan Social Media

entry.content:
KOMPAS.TV - Mobil milik penyanyi dangdut Via Vallen terbakar di depan rumahnya di Desa Kalitengah, Sidoarjo, Jawa Timur, Selasa (30/06/2020) dini hari.
Dari hasil pemeriksaan polisi, pelaku adalah penggemarnya dan mengaku sakit hati karena tidak dapat bertemu dengan idolanya.
Menanggapi hal tersebut, seorang Psikiater bernama Nova Riyanti Yusuf menjelaskan jika dalam dunia psikolog terdapat istilah Celebrity Worship Syndrome, adalah sindrom kekaguman terhadap selebriti.
Sindrom ini bukan sebuah diagnosis, namun ada tahapan seseorang bisa berada dititik tersebut.
Kekaguman paling ringan disebut dengan entertainment social.
"Pikiran obsesive paling ringan itu entertainment social. Jadi misalnya kita kagum dengan dia, dan paling-paling sama temen kita mau bahas, atau punya posternya di kamar," kata Riyanti.
Tahap kekaguman selanjutnya adalah intense personal. Atau obsesi yang berada pada level tengah atau intermediate.
Seseorang akan merasa bahwa selebriti ini adalah miliknya atau soulmate nya. Paling parah akan menyebabkan seseorang mulai meniru gaya atau bahkan melakukan operasi plastik agar terlihat mirip.
Riyanti juga menyebut tahap ketiga yang ekstrem disebut dengan istilah Boarderline Pathology dimana seseorang memiliki sifat erotomania atau sebuah gangguan seseorang merasa dicintai oleh orang lain padahal kenyataannya tidak.
Namun tak bisa dipungkiri jika rasa kekaguman kepada seorang idola menjadi reinforcement atau menguatkan rasa memiliki dan menjadi bagian dari suatu komunitas idola yang sama dan suatu pergerakan yang positif.
Bahsa lebih lengkap bersama dengan Psikiater Nova Riyanti Yusuf, dan salah satu Inisiator atau Penggagas Sobat Ambyar, Jarkio.
entry.summary: KOMPAS.TV - Mobil milik penyanyi dangdut Via Vallen terbakar di depan rumahnya di Desa Kalitengah, Sidoarjo, Jawa Timur, Selasa (30/06/2020) dini hari. Dari hasil pemeriksaan polisi, pelaku adalah penggemarnya dan mengaku sakit hati karena tidak dapat bertemu dengan idolanya. Menanggapi hal tersebut, seorang Psikiater bernama Nova Riyanti Yusuf menjelaskan jika dalam dunia psikolog terdapat istilah Celebrity Worship Syndrome, adalah sindrom kekaguman terhadap selebriti. Sindrom ini bukan sebuah diagnosis, namun ada tahapan seseorang bisa berada dititik tersebut. Kekaguman paling ringan disebut dengan entertainment social. "Pikiran obsesive paling ringan itu entertainment social. Jadi misalnya kita kagum dengan dia, dan paling-paling sama temen kita mau bahas, atau punya posternya di kamar," kata Riyanti. Tahap kekaguman selanjutnya adalah intense personal. Atau obsesi yang berada pada level tengah atau intermediate. Seseorang akan merasa bahwa selebriti ini adalah miliknya atau soulmate nya. Paling parah akan menyebabkan seseorang mulai meniru gaya atau bahkan melakukan operasi plastik agar terlihat mirip. Riyanti juga menyebut tahap ketiga yang ekstrem disebut dengan istilah Boarderline Pathology dimana seseorang memiliki sifat erotomania atau sebuah gangguan seseorang merasa dicintai oleh orang lain padahal kenyataannya tidak. Namun tak bisa dipungkiri jika rasa kekaguman kepada seorang idola menjadi reinforcement atau menguatkan rasa memiliki dan menjadi bagian dari suatu komunitas idola yang sama dan suatu pergerakan yang positif. Bahsa lebih lengkap bersama dengan Psikiater Nova Riyanti Yusuf, dan salah satu Inisiator atau Penggagas Sobat Ambyar, Jarkio.

entry.title: What It’s Like To Grow Up With Two Moms

link.title: What It’s Like To Grow Up With Two Moms

entry.content:
Sophiya Montaño went viral online when she shared what it’s really like to grow up with two moms. It certainly wasn’t a walk in the park, but her moms taught her how to be resilient. She learned, at an early age, not to fear speaking out and letting people know how she feels.
When she posted her story on Facebook, a lot of children of same-sex parents expressed their appreciation and support.
You’ll find more stories like this on our website: www.smartparenting.com.ph
Don’t forget to check out our Facebook Page:
You can also join our Facebook Group:
Follow us on Instagram:
And Twitter:
entry.summary: Sophiya Montaño went viral online when she shared what it’s really like to grow up with two moms. It certainly wasn’t a walk in the park, but her moms taught her how to be resilient. She learned, at an early age, not to fear speaking out and letting people know how she feels. When she posted her story on Facebook, a lot of children of same-sex parents expressed their appreciation and support. You’ll find more stories like this on our website: www.smartparenting.com.ph Don’t forget to check out our Facebook Page: You can also join our Facebook Group: Follow us on Instagram: And Twitter:

entry.title: Swami Vivekananda’s 118th death anniversary: A peek into his lesser known life Oneindia News

link.title: Swami Vivekananda’s 118th death anniversary: A peek into his lesser known life Oneindia News

entry.content:
July 4 marks the death anniversary of Swami Vivekananda, India’s respected spiritual leader who was believed to make impossible possible. Born in Kolkata on January 12, 1863, Swami Vivekananda was known as Narendra Nath Datta in his pre-monastic life. With a special interest in Western philosophy and history, Vivekananda was often assailed by doubts about the existence of God. It was during this time, that he met Sri Ramakrishna, who later became his guru.Swami Vivekananda founded Ramakrishna Mission on 1 May 1897 for one’s own salvation and for the welfare of the world. He was a great thinker, great orator and passionate patriot. Apart from his brilliant intelligence, there are many lesser known facts about his life that people don’t know about.
#118thDeathAnniversary
entry.summary: July 4 marks the death anniversary of Swami Vivekananda, India’s respected spiritual leader who was believed to make impossible possible. Born in Kolkata on January 12, 1863, Swami Vivekananda was known as Narendra Nath Datta in his pre-monastic life. With a special interest in Western philosophy and history, Vivekananda was often assailed by doubts about the existence of God. It was during this time, that he met Sri Ramakrishna, who later became his guru.Swami Vivekananda founded Ramakrishna Mission on 1 May 1897 for one’s own salvation and for the welfare of the world. He was a great thinker, great orator and passionate patriot. Apart from his brilliant intelligence, there are many lesser known facts about his life that people don’t know about. #118thDeathAnniversary

entry.title: Tom Hanks Shares 3 Three Simple Things To Fight COVID-19

link.title: Tom Hanks Shares 3 Three Simple Things To Fight COVID-19

entry.content:
During a virtual press tour for his new film Greyhound, actor Tom Hanks, who tested Coronavirus Positive earlier this year, spoke about the devastating effects of the pandemic and addressed people who neglect security measures in the midst of the ongoing major pandemic. Tom Hanks encouraged fans in the interview to ‘do their part’ and said ‘wear a mask, social distance & wash hands’ is important. Adding to that, Tom Hanks said it’s a shame on those people who can’t ‘find it in themselves to practice these three very fundamental things. Tom Hanks also provided an update on how Rita Wilson and he and his wife are doing months after their diagnosis and revealed they had 10 days of very uncomfortable symptoms. In addition to this, Tom Hanks revealed that he and his wife were isolated to test if their temperatures had spiked and if their lungs had filled up. He also noted he and his wife are COVID-19 model recoverees. Besides Tom Hanks and Rita Wilson stars like Madonna and Elba Charlotte Lawrence, Manu Dibango, Colton Underwood and Andy Cohen tested positive for the novel Coronavirus.
Log On To Our Official Website :
For More Such News & Gossips Subscribe now! :
Lehren On Podcast:
Download The ‘Lehren App’:
Facebook :
Twitter:
entry.summary: During a virtual press tour for his new film Greyhound, actor Tom Hanks, who tested Coronavirus Positive earlier this year, spoke about the devastating effects of the pandemic and addressed people who neglect security measures in the midst of the ongoing major pandemic. Tom Hanks encouraged fans in the interview to ‘do their part’ and said ‘wear a mask, social distance & wash hands’ is important. Adding to that, Tom Hanks said it’s a shame on those people who can’t ‘find it in themselves to practice these three very fundamental things. Tom Hanks also provided an update on how Rita Wilson and he and his wife are doing months after their diagnosis and revealed they had 10 days of very uncomfortable symptoms. In addition to this, Tom Hanks revealed that he and his wife were isolated to test if their temperatures had spiked and if their lungs had filled up. He also noted he and his wife are COVID-19 model recoverees. Besides Tom Hanks and Rita Wilson stars like Madonna and Elba Charlotte Lawrence, Manu Dibango, Colton Underwood and Andy Cohen tested positive for the novel Coronavirus. entry.title: CBSE chops syllabus for classes 9 to 12 & China withdraws in more areas Oneindia News

link.title: CBSE chops syllabus for classes 9 to 12 & China withdraws in more areas Oneindia News

entry.content:
CBSE reduces syllabus by 30% for Classes 9 to 12; India-China troops withdraw in key areas in eastern Ladakh after Galwan Valley pull-back; Ex-CEO of fraud-hit bank found dead outside Bengaluru residence; Hospital-like preparedness at Nitish Kumar’s residence after niece tests Covid positive; Sanjay Leela Bhansali answers why he dropped Sushant Singh Rajput from 4 projects and more news
#CBSE #Ladakh #Border
entry.summary: CBSE reduces syllabus by 30% for Classes 9 to 12; India-China troops withdraw in key areas in eastern Ladakh after Galwan Valley pull-back; Ex-CEO of fraud-hit bank found dead outside Bengaluru residence; Hospital-like preparedness at Nitish Kumar’s residence after niece tests Covid positive; Sanjay Leela Bhansali answers why he dropped Sushant Singh Rajput from 4 projects and more news #CBSE #Ladakh #Border

entry.title: Nick Cordero’s GoFundMe Raises More Than $860K for His Family

link.title: Nick Cordero’s GoFundMe Raises More Than $860K for His Family

entry.content:
Nick Cordero’s GoFundMe Raises More Than $860K for His Family
Lending a helping hand. Fans and friends have donated more than $850,000 to a GoFundMe page for Nick Cordero that will go to his wife, AMANDA KLOOTS, and infant son, Elvis, following the Broadway star’s death from complications related to coronavirus.
***************************
••••INFORMATION
• Source: usmagazine
—————————————————————————
Videos can use content-based copyright law contains reasonable use Fair Use (
Very excited to partner with other electronic newspaper pages.
Please send me an email
Thanks you for watching

Fans and friends have donated more than $850,000 to a GoFundMe page for Nick Cordero that will go to his wife, AMANDA KLOOTS, and infant son, Elvis, following the Broadway star’s death from complications related to coronavirus. *************************** ••••INFORMATION • Source: usmagazine ————————————————————————— Videos can use content-based copyright law contains reasonable use Fair Use ( Very excited to partner with other electronic newspaper pages. entry.title: Doval speaks to Chinese foreign minister, both agree to expedite disengagement Oneindia Malayalam

link.title: Doval speaks to Chinese foreign minister, both agree to expedite disengagement Oneindia Malayalam

entry.content:
Doval speaks to Chinese foreign minister, both agree to expedite disengagement
അതിര്‍ത്തിയില്‍ സംഘര്‍ഷം നിലനില്‍ക്കുന്ന പശ്ചാത്തലത്തില്‍ ചൈനീസ് വിദേശകാര്യമന്ത്രിയും സ്‌റ്റേറ്റ് കൗണ്‍സിലറുമായ വാങ് യീയുമായി ചര്‍ച്ച നടത്തി അജിത് ഡോവല്‍. വീഡിയോ കോള്‍ വഴിയാണ് ദേശീയ സുരക്ഷാ ഉപദേഷ്ടാവ് ചൈനീസ് വിദേശകാര്യ മന്ത്രിയുമായി ചര്‍ച്ച നടത്തിയത്.
entry.summary: Doval speaks to Chinese foreign minister, both agree to expedite disengagement അതിര്‍ത്തിയില്‍ സംഘര്‍ഷം നിലനില്‍ക്കുന്ന പശ്ചാത്തലത്തില്‍ ചൈനീസ് വിദേശകാര്യമന്ത്രിയും സ്‌റ്റേറ്റ് കൗണ്‍സിലറുമായ വാങ് യീയുമായി ചര്‍ച്ച നടത്തി അജിത് ഡോവല്‍. വീഡിയോ കോള്‍ വഴിയാണ് ദേശീയ സുരക്ഷാ ഉപദേഷ്ടാവ് ചൈനീസ് വിദേശകാര്യ മന്ത്രിയുമായി ചര്‍ച്ച നടത്തിയത്.

entry.title: Donald Trump, Kim Jong Un మధ్య ఇప్పట్లో ఎలాంటి సమావేశాలు లేవు! - Kim Yo Jong Oneindia Telugu

link.title: Donald Trump, Kim Jong Un మధ్య ఇప్పట్లో ఎలాంటి సమావేశాలు లేవు! - Kim Yo Jong Oneindia Telugu

entry.content:
The powerful sister of North Korean leader Kim Jong Un said Friday she doesn’t expect her brother to meet President Donald Trump this year, saying there’s no reason for the North to gift Trump high-profile meetings when it’s not being substantially rewarded in return.
#KimJongUn
#KimYoJong
#NorthKorea
#StephenBiegun
#DonaldTrump
#DonaldTrumpwithKim
#southkorea
డొనాల్డ్ ట్రంప్, కిమ్‌జొంగ్ మధ్య ఈ ఏడాది ఓ అత్యున్నత స్థాయి సమావేశం ఏర్పాటు కావొచ్చంటూ ఇదివరకు వార్తలు వెలువడ్డాయి. ఈ విషయాన్ని అమెరికా విదేశాంగ మంత్రిత్వ శాఖ అధికారులు సైతం ఓ దశలో ధృవీకరించారు. కిమ్‌జొంగ్ అంగీకరిస్తే..డొనాల్డ్ ట్రంప్ ఆయనతో భేటీ అవుతారంటూ నాలుగు నెలల కిందటే ఓ ప్రకటన చేశారు.
entry.summary: The powerful sister of North Korean leader Kim Jong Un said Friday she doesn’t expect her brother to meet President Donald Trump this year, saying there’s no reason for the North to gift Trump high-profile meetings when it’s not being substantially rewarded in return. #KimJongUn #KimYoJong #NorthKorea #StephenBiegun #DonaldTrump #DonaldTrumpwithKim #southkorea డొనాల్డ్ ట్రంప్, కిమ్‌జొంగ్ మధ్య ఈ ఏడాది ఓ అత్యున్నత స్థాయి సమావేశం ఏర్పాటు కావొచ్చంటూ ఇదివరకు వార్తలు వెలువడ్డాయి. ఈ విషయాన్ని అమెరికా విదేశాంగ మంత్రిత్వ శాఖ అధికారులు సైతం ఓ దశలో ధృవీకరించారు. కిమ్‌జొంగ్ అంగీకరిస్తే..డొనాల్డ్ ట్రంప్ ఆయనతో భేటీ అవుతారంటూ నాలుగు నెలల కిందటే ఓ ప్రకటన చేశారు.

entry.title: Katy Perry Reveals Playful KP5 Album Cover Billboard News

link.title: Katy Perry Reveals Playful KP5 Album Cover Billboard News

entry.content: Katy Perry decided to clown around a bit with the cover reveal of her fifth album on Wednesday (July 8).
entry.summary: Katy Perry decided to clown around a bit with the cover reveal of her fifth album on Wednesday (July 8).

entry.title: ENG vs WI 1st Test: Stuart Broad not in the playing XI against West Indies वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: ENG vs WI 1st Test: Stuart Broad not in the playing XI against West Indies वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Senior England pacer Stuart Broad dropped from the playing XI for the first Test against West Indies starting Wednesday with Jofra Archer and Mark Wood being tipped to partner James Anderson. According to a report in ‘The Guardian, “Broad faces the prospect of missing a first home Test match in eight years as England give serious consideration to unleashing the dual pace of Jofra Archer and Mark Wood at the earliest opportunity.
ग्लैंड के सीनियर तेज गेंदबाज स्टुअर्ट ब्रॉड को वेस्टइंडीज के खिलाफ 8 जुलाई से शुरू हुए पहले टेस्ट क्रिकेट मैच की प्लेइंग इलेवन में जगह नहीं मिली है। इंग्लैंड का टीम प्रबंधन तेज गेंदबाजी के अगुआ जेम्स एंडरसन के साथ जोफ्रा आर्चर और मार्क वुड को प्लेइंग इलेवन में रखा है। ब्रॉड को आठ साल में पहली बार घरेलू टेस्ट मैच से बाहर होना पड़ा है।
#ENGVSWI #StuartBroad #PlayingXI
entry.summary: Senior England pacer Stuart Broad dropped from the playing XI for the first Test against West Indies starting Wednesday with Jofra Archer and Mark Wood being tipped to partner James Anderson. According to a report in ‘The Guardian, “Broad faces the prospect of missing a first home Test match in eight years as England give serious consideration to unleashing the dual pace of Jofra Archer and Mark Wood at the earliest opportunity. ग्लैंड के सीनियर तेज गेंदबाज स्टुअर्ट ब्रॉड को वेस्टइंडीज के खिलाफ 8 जुलाई से शुरू हुए पहले टेस्ट क्रिकेट मैच की प्लेइंग इलेवन में जगह नहीं मिली है। इंग्लैंड का टीम प्रबंधन तेज गेंदबाजी के अगुआ जेम्स एंडरसन के साथ जोफ्रा आर्चर और मार्क वुड को प्लेइंग इलेवन में रखा है। ब्रॉड को आठ साल में पहली बार घरेलू टेस्ट मैच से बाहर होना पड़ा है। #ENGVSWI #StuartBroad #PlayingXI

entry.title: ‘Don’t worry about bubonic plague,’ Palace assures public

link.title: ‘Don’t worry about bubonic plague,’ Palace assures public

entry.content:
Malacañang told the public that there was nothing to worry about the case of bubonic plague in China’s northern inner Mongolia region as the country’s borders are still closed due to the present COVID-19 pandemic.
READ:
entry.summary: Malacañang told the public that there was nothing to worry about the case of bubonic plague in China’s northern inner Mongolia region as the country’s borders are still closed due to the present COVID-19 pandemic. READ:

entry.title: THIERRY NDONG OWONA: « Le Bir est une unité d’élite, une milice privée et une pompe à fric »

link.title: THIERRY NDONG OWONA: « Le Bir est une unité d’élite, une milice privée et une pompe à fric »

entry.content: Thierry Ndong Owona est un journaliste qui excelle dans le journalisme d’investigation. Raison pour laquelle, il a choisi de partager avec Journalducameroun Tv, l’enquête menée par ses confrères Emmanuel Freudenthal et Youri Van Der Weide sur le Bataillon d’intervention rapide. Il souhaite plus de transparence de la fortune publique dans les contrats qui lient le Cameroun aux instructeurs israéliens du BIR.
entry.summary: Thierry Ndong Owona est un journaliste qui excelle dans le journalisme d’investigation. Raison pour laquelle, il a choisi de partager avec Journalducameroun Tv, l’enquête menée par ses confrères Emmanuel Freudenthal et Youri Van Der Weide sur le Bataillon d’intervention rapide. Il souhaite plus de transparence de la fortune publique dans les contrats qui lient le Cameroun aux instructeurs israéliens du BIR.
